steps.instruction: Ensure the Branch TestBed app is open on its main screen. If you see buttons like 'Create Branch Link', 'Share Branch Link', you are already on the main screen. If you are on a different screen (e.g. a log screen, a dialog, or any other app), press Back repeatedly until you reach the main screen, or go to the device home screen, then find and open the 'Branch-SDK-TestBed' app.
Wait up to 5 seconds for the Branch link URL to be generated and displayed in the text field below the buttons. The URL should start with 'https://' and contain 'branch' or 'app.link'.
Check if a URL containing 'bnctestbed.app.link' is visible on the screen. The URL will have additional characters after it. If visible, succeed. If not visible, fail the test.
